Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = obj.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[{role}]: {c[""text""][:500]}''\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:500]}''\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) print\(f''Total lines in last 100KB: {len\(lines\)}''\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if role in \(''user'', ''assistant''\) and content: if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = c[''text''][:800] print\(f''[{role.upper\(\)}]: {text}''\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''[{role.upper\(\)}]: {content[:800]}''\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) print\(f''Total lines: {len\(lines\)}''\) messages = [] for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if role in \(''user'', ''assistant''\) and content: if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': messages.append\(\(role, c[''text''][:1000]\)\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\): messages.append\(\(role, content[:1000]\)\) except: pass for role, text in messages[-20:]: print\(f''[{role.upper\(\)}]: {text}''\) print\(''---''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) print\(f''Total lines: {len\(lines\)}''\) messages = [] for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if role in \(''user'', ''assistant''\) and content: if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': messages.append\(\(role, c[''text''][:2000]\)\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\): messages.append\(\(role, content[:2000]\)\) except: pass for role, text in messages[-40:]: print\(f''[{role.upper\(\)}]: {text}''\) print\(''---''\) ")
